## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Record-breaking week with 700+ likes and 26,000+ impressions on content](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [New content strategy aims for 10 articles/week, with potential to scale to 15](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Visual content to be prioritized using templates and possibly AI-generated images](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Integration pages being updated with new layout, pending review](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Content refresh and metadata optimization efforts ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Best week ever: 700+ likes, 26,000+ impressions](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Authentication/authorization articles outperforming e-commerce content](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [New goal: aim for 1000 likes as soon as possible](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [60 new articles in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-15 new articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Theo confident in reviewing 10-15 articles weekly](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Considering hiring freelancer for additional review capacity if needed](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Agreed to publish articles with current date, not backdated](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

### Visual Content Enhancement

  - [Emphasis on adding valuable visuals to increase time on page](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Plan to start with simple templates (quotes, step-by-step guides)](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Exploring options for mini infographics and custom graphics](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Considering embedding relevant YouTube videos](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

### Content Refresh and Metadata Optimization

  - [5 content refreshes per week](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [10 metadata optimizations per week for low click-through rate articles](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Need to identify articles lacking metadata for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [New layout for integration pages ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [React Admin integration page to be prioritized and shared externally](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Team to review and potentially sunset certain integration pages (e.g., languages without direct Strapi integration)](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Theo to review new integration page layout](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Andrej to prepare React Admin integration page draft for external review](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Continue with 10 new articles per week production](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Implement visual content strategy starting with simple templates](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Identify and optimize articles lacking metadata](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Paul to follow up on integration page categorization and updates](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Discuss potential sunsetting of certain integration pages in future meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6cBT3tSGdD4zSMmPnwxjrJjX4DW_SLsM?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
